title: Kokoro voice catalog
description: Voice entries for the Kokoro TTS engine. Loaded at module import by partner/engine.py via local_ai_platform.registries.load_voice_catalog. Adding a voice = JSON edit + module re-import; no Python edit. The Flutter voice picker dropdown reads this list verbatim.

id.description: Stable voice identifier (e.g. 'af_heart'). Used as the lookup key and surfaced in app_events. Must be unique across the catalog.

display_name.description: Human-friendly label shown in the Flutter voice picker.

gender.description: Voice gender. Picker UI assumes the binary set today; adding 'neutral' or another value is a deliberate update that should land alongside picker-UI changes.

description.description: Short prose summary shown next to the display_name in the voice picker.
